code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut current = ""
mut idx = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      if idx % 2 == 0
        let v_opt = string.parse_int(current)
        match v_opt
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      idx = idx + 1
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  if idx % 2 == 0
    let v_opt = string.parse_int(current)
    match v_opt
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
let m = result.len()
while j < m
  let v_opt = result.get(j)
  let v = match v_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end

println(out)
